imageAlt: Re-order invoice line items roadmap item preview image
title: Re-order invoice line items
summaryBody: From ‘remove friction from invoicing journey’ proposal. Blocked by SwiftUI migration for iOS, which is likely a Large project. There also would be performance issues we’d need to revisit/tackle for both platforms (i.e. when re-order items would then ‘save’ the invoice again which would ultimately be resource-intensive for those with many line items).
detailBody: From ‘remove friction from invoicing journey’ proposal. Blocked by SwiftUI migration for iOS, which is likely a Large project.
